ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the faculty member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member's employment was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty member (e.g., Prof, AsstProf) */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the faculty member (e.g., B, A, C) */,
  "years_phd" INTEGER /* Number of years since the faculty member received their PhD */,
  "years_service" INTEGER /* Number of years of service */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the faculty member */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current college the faculty member belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_rank FOREIGN KEY ("rank") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_discipline FOREIGN KEY ("discipline") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the rank */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the discipline belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplines_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the department belongs to */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the college belongs to */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the college */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_departments" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member ended their tenure in the department (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_ranks" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank the faculty member holds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member started with the current rank */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member ended their current rank (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id", "rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the salary became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, department chair, faculty member) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the faculty data */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., salary, department) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "faculty_id")
)
